messages.content: ok kind of a funny coincidence, i keep seeing this one little cafe pop up everywhere this week

Oh that's fun, those little coincidences are kind of delightful! Like the universe is nudging you toward a cortado or something 😄

How has it been popping up - like people mentioning it, or you keep walking past it, or what?
like a friend mentioned it, then i walked past it, then it was in a show i was watching. three times

The classic "rule of three" coincidence! There's something about three times that really makes your brain go "okay WHAT is happening" 😄

It's funny how that works - like your friend probably mentioned dozens of places this week, and you walked past tons of cafes, but your brain latched onto *this one* because it was already on your radar. The first mention kind of primes you to notice it.

That said... it does feel a little like a sign, right? At 9pm it might be a bit late for coffee but maybe worth checking out soon? What kind of cafe is it - does it look like your kind of place?
feels like the universe is nudging me to finally go check it out lol. i'm a little superstitious like that

Ha, honestly that's a pretty fun way to live! And in this case the "superstition" is pointing you toward trying a cute cafe, so like... worst case scenario you get a good coffee out of it 😄

What's holding you back from just going? Is it more of a "I need someone to go with" situation or just haven't gotten around to it?
i know it's just my brain noticing the same thing more, but it's a fun excuse to try a new spot

Yeah exactly, you basically get the best of both worlds - you *know* the rational explanation but you still get to enjoy the little magical feeling of it. No harm in leaning into it!

And honestly "the universe told me to" is a much better story to tell people about how you found your new favorite cafe than "I saw it on Google Maps" 😄

Are you thinking of going solo or dragging someone along?
gonna go this weekend and get whatever their signature drink is. small adventures, you know

I love that attitude - small adventures are so underrated! There's something really satisfying about just... following a little nudge and seeing what happens.

And the signature drink order is the right move, it's like the whole point of going somewhere new. Let them show you what they're about.

Hope it's great! You'll have to report back on whether the universe steered you right 😄
